title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
summary: 三星电子为全球员工部署ChatGPT Enterprise和Codex，是OpenAI最大规模的企业AI应用之一。
analysis_note: 商业化应用案例，技术深度一般，但体现AI在企业级落地的趋势。
